no_action.description: Observe only; no intervention cost incurred.

low_touch_outreach.description: Digital reminder, education, or light outreach.

care_coordination_call.description: Moderate-cost nurse or care coordination call.

intensive_case_management.description: High-touch intervention with highest operational cost.

training_notes.offline_initialization: Offline Q-learning training bootstraps episodes from stylized initial risk probabilities by risk tier. Those bootstrap probabilities are used only to initialize simulated training episodes.
training_notes.online_policy_use: Online policy use starts from the actual supervised-model probability for the beneficiary and maps that empirical score into the MDP state and transition logic.
training_notes.episode_dynamics: Chronic burden is treated as fixed within the simulated episode horizon in v1, while risk tier, utilization intensity, and prior intervention status can change across steps.

disclaimer: The policy layer is a simulated MDP/Q-learning intervention prototype built on stylized transition and reward assumptions. It is not causally learned from real intervention-response histories.
